arts.ttl: Son Heung-min's telling Yang Min-hyeok response as Ange Postecoglou plans Tottenham future
arts.sum: Yang is now at Hotspur Way after departing his homeland at the beginning of the week, with Spurs able to register him as a player from January 1st. "Yeah he has been in the building the last couple of days sort of having a good look around," explained the 59-year-old.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou has made an 'unacceptable' mistake that Arne Slot never would at Liverpool
arts.sum: Arne Slot and Ange Postecoglou have showcased very different methods when it comes to the handling of their out-of-form players at Liverpool and Tottenham Hotspur

arts.ttl: Tottenham could be without 10 players for Liverpool as Arne Slot faces suspension worry
arts.sum: A look at the injury and suspension latest ahead of Tottenham Hotspur vs Liverpool in the Premier League on Sunday

arts.ttl: ‘I’m terrified’: Jamie Carragher says there’s something he’s so scared about with Liverpool right now
arts.sum: Liverpool’s season genuinely couldn’t be going much better. The Reds are top of the Premier League, top of the Champions League and through to the...

arts.ttl: Team News: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Liverpool injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Tottenham Hotspur and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Player admits Liverpool offer caught him by surprise – “Uncomfortable” moment forced him into isolation
arts.sum: Real Sociedad star Martin Zubimendi has admitted he was caught by surprise by Liverpool’s bid for him in the summer and had to isolate himself before turning them down. El Diario Vasco have an interview with the 25-year-old today after a summer in which he found himself firmly in the spotlight. arts.ttl: I was too young when I joined Liverpool - Now I want to get the better of them
arts.sum: Dominic Solanke will come up against his former side Liverpool on Sunday when the Reds travel to Tottenham Hotspur

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher names his most underrated Liverpool team-mate: 'Sold too early'
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has claimed Liverpool were too quick to sell Danny Murphy with the former Reds midfielder renowned for his performances in the biggest of clashes

arts.ttl: Tottenham star Dominic Solanke hits back at Jamie Carragher's comments on Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham have scored 36 goals - the second highest in the top flight - but have shown huge vulnerabilities at the other end too, with their chaotic 4-3 win over Manchester United in midweek summing up their season

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou could lose more Tottenham stars with five players facing suspension risk
arts.sum: As ever, any player who obtains five yellow cards from the first 19 Premier League games of the season will receive a one-match ban as punishment. Bentancur is the Tottenham player most at risk of receiving a one-match ban for five yellow cards as he is currently on four.
